$meta.purpose: Define light/dark theme colors, semantic overrides, and usage guidelines

formatNote: Canonical values are as-authored (oklch, rgb, hex). Maintain exact strings during generation.

primary.usage: Use for primary triggers, action buttons background, main links, text input focus rings, and active page indications.

cloudflareOrange.usage: Use exclusively for brand logo coloring, support portal branding titles, premium status labels, and sparkles icons. Never use for standard actions or controls.

background.usage: Application canvas background. Recreates a clean, light/dark neutral background.

foreground.usage: Primary body copy, paragraph texts, and high-contrast labels.

card.usage: Surface panels, layout grid cells, and navigation cards.

cardForeground.usage: Default text headers and body copy placed inside cards.

popover.usage: Floating menus, user profiles, language selectors, dropdown overlays.

popoverForeground.usage: Text options and triggers inside popover overlays.

primaryForeground.usage: High-contrast text placed inside primary blue background controls.

secondary.usage: Background for secondary action buttons, input groups, or secondary panels.

secondaryForeground.usage: Labels and texts placed inside secondary surfaces.

muted.usage: Backgrounds of inactive items, hover background for list items, disabled elements.

mutedForeground.usage: Secondary headings, help descriptions, footer copy, disabled label text, and default line icons.

accent.usage: Hover background states for list menu rows or interactive lists.

accentForeground.usage: Focus highlights, active menu link text.

destructive.usage: Fills/text for high-alert error messages, delete button highlights, invalid validation flags.

border.usage: Hairline 1px borders, layout separators, and card grid borders.

input.usage: Border outline of text fields, search boxes, and dropdown select buttons.

ring.usage: Outline focus ring color for interactive inputs, buttons, and drawers.

background.usage: Sidebar panel background. Keeps consistency with app backgrounds.

primaryForeground.usage: Primary highlight label color inside sidebar.

accent.usage: Hover background state for sidebar items.

accentForeground.usage: Selected active item label text color.

border.usage: Outer boundary sidebar lines and internal section groupings.

ring.usage: Focus outline indicator on sidebar triggers.

chart-1.usage: Primary chart data series metric line/bar color.

pairings.rule: Always pair primary background with primaryForeground text to ensure high visual contrast.
Use secondaryForeground for labels inside card panels or secondary buttons.
Destructive background elements must use a lighter red tint (destructive/10 or destructive/20) and pair with full destructive text for high legibility.
